title: AEO sales script — '50 fishing poles' analogy + Springfield case study
html:
Yahir captured a sales script for the AI Presence System — opens with the "50 fishing poles in the pond" analogy (your business is fishing with one pole, we add 50 channels of visibility), drops a case study ("roofing company in Springfield raised visibility score by 89 points"), then closes with the exclusivity play: "we only work with one company per industry per ZIP code... I have another call with someone in your zip tomorrow — want me to cancel that if this makes sense for you?"

TL;DR

  • aeo agency / insight ai sales script formalized — 50-fishing-poles analogy + concrete case study + ZIP-exclusivity scarcity close.
  • "One company per industry per ZIP" = the same urgency+scarcity mechanic Yahir's been collecting; cancel-the-other-call line is the ask.
  • Confirms by Nov-12 the offer is being pitched live, not just designed — sales-call mode, not slideware mode.

aeo agency · insight ai · ai search optimization · zip exclusivity close · sales scripts yahir uses · exclusivity as chinese trait
